name: Brickell Capital Finance
description_short: Brickell Capital Finance is a credit repair provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 4.8/5 with 24 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Brickell Capital Finance is a credit repair provider serving clients in Miami, Florida. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 24 reviews, Brickell Capital Finance has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Miami area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a finance broker, financial consultant, investment bank, Brickell Capital Finance provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Miami, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Brickell Capital Finance operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Miami, Florida area who are considering Brickell Capital Finance should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
